title: PromptDefinition
description: Design contract for spec 001. The single source of truth for a prompt's shape; per-language shapes (Pydantic v2 / TS types / Rust serde structs) are code-generated from this. Spec 001 authors and generates this; it does NOT consume it (no rendering/validation/resolution — specs 002+). The implementation copy lives at schemas/jsonschema/.

name.description: Logical prompt name; the caller's reference key.

role.description: Conversational role; first-class metadata the caller reads. Shared across all variants.

body.description: The DEFAULT variant's template source. The root body IS the default arm (FR-011); surfaced under reserved name 'default' with is_default=true.

variables.description: Declared input variables, shared across all variants. Rich enough to generate-then-extend a typed Vars model in a later spec.

variants.description: Named alternative arms. Absent => the prompt has only the default (root body) arm. Each arm differs ONLY in body (+ optional opaque meta).

propertyNames.description: A variants entry named 'default' is rejected (FR-011b): it collides with the structural default arm (the root body).

output_model.description: Optional OPAQUE reference to the caller's output model (e.g. 'NodeOutput'). Stored and echoed; never resolved, loaded, or parsed (Principle III). Shared across variants.

metadata.description: Arbitrary prompt-level metadata; library-OPAQUE (may include uninterpreted model/param hints). Never interpreted by the library.

meta.description: The default (root) arm's selection metadata; library-opaque (weight, group, tags, ...). Symmetric with Variant.meta.

VariableDecl.description: A declared input variable: type + provenance + optional JSON-Schema validation constraints (carried for generate-then-extend).

type.description: JSON-Schema type keyword(s) for the variable.

provenance.description: Per-field provenance tag (FR-010a). Plumbed/enforced in later specs.

Variant.description: A named alternative arm. May carry ONLY body and meta; redefining role/variables/output_model is rejected (FR-011a).

body.description: The variant's template source — the only field that differs per variant.

meta.description: Library-OPAQUE selection metadata (weight, group, tags, ...). Stored + exposed; never interpreted by the library (caller selects). No schema-enforced selection semantics (FR-011c).
